query:
SELECT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM email_messages m
            JOIN email_message_recipients r ON r.message_id = m.id
            JOIN email_contacts c ON c.id = r.contact_id
            WHERE m.link_id = $1
              AND m.is_sent = true
              AND LOWER(c.email_address) = $2
            LIMIT 1
        ) AS "exists!"
